☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Light prided himself on his self-control. It was what got him through a lot of things; Dealing with idiots, manipulating others for his own benefit, blah blah blah. A whole lot of things that probably made him seem morally gray at the best of times if not completely compromised and willing to do whatever it takes to achieve his own goals. He didn’t rush things, he played the long game with his high intelligence and penchant for emotional manipulation. People don’t catch him off guard, it’s practically impossible. He always knows whats going to happen because he’s always guiding the conversation.

And yet here he is, the great Light Yagami, trying and failing to calm down his romantic partner from doing anything intimate with him in what was supposedly the privacy of his own bedroom. It wasn’t private at all. Not with the camera’s placed around—meaning someone was watching them, and of course he knew exactly why—and the Shinigami currently laughing its ass off at how Light was so clearly struggling to get his partner to understand that he wasn’t being weird about anything despite the fact he was very clearly trying to talk his way out of any particularly.. indecent intimacy with them. ❞
creator: AyoIdk
